description: Far Seer calibration set 4 + Marlinman discriminator attempt, 2026-07-03 14:43-14:56 (WOS_BattleReports_FarSeerCalibration_4.pdf). Deterministic (no procs). Experiments: tier rungs T3/T4/T5, single-class T6 lancer/marksman runs, beast ladder Lv10/Lv15 extensions, Marlinman+Seo-yoon L5 (censored - full wipes). All power identities verified (own pw = injured x tier power identifies tiers: -12=T3, -18=T4, -26=T5, -40=T6, -56=T7).

Lv15 Giant Tapir.unit_power_check: 83 kills x 13 = 1,079 = observed power loss EXACT (Lv5.0 units)

battles.note: SINGLE-CLASS lancer run; bars show blue on Lancer row
FIRST UNCENSORED OWN-CASUALTY OBSERVABLE: 563 incapacitated of 1000 for the full 1,070 wipe; beast groups lost 65/255/75/300/75/300

marlinman_censored.note: even 2,000 T1 on the +850% panel wipe the Tapir; 6 incapacitated

discoveries: TIER LADDER now T1-T5,T7 at N=1000 vs Musk12: 11/26/51/87/125/252.

SEO-YOON IS A MARKSMAN HERO: her card injected +140.1/+148.1/+5.4/+5.4 into Marlinman's Marksman panel rows (1037.4 vs 897.3 baseline attack etc.) while all slots except hers show Vacant - third documented card injection.

Marlinman discriminator INCONCLUSIVE as run (full wipes censor kills). Fix: DEFEAT configs - e.g. Marlinman 200-300 T1/T7 infantry vs Lv20-25 field beast, no-hero vs Seo-yoon pair; T1/T7 have no procs so runs stay deterministic even on his account.
Lv10 Musk Ox has SIX groups; Lv15 Tapir has three (1,120/1,310/1,310 at Lv5.0).
Rallying Beat L5 tooltip: +25% (completes the 5/10/15/20/25 ladder).
